criteria.name: Architecture Clarity & Coherence
criteria.description: Is the overall architecture clear, documented, and coherent?

criteria.name: Stack Modernité & Maintenance
criteria.description: Are technology components modern, actively maintained, and not obsolete?

criteria.name: Code Lisibilité & Modularité
criteria.description: Is code readable and modular with clear separation of concerns?

criteria.name: Test Coverage & Quality
criteria.description: Is test coverage adequate (target 60%+) with high-quality, relevant tests?

criteria.name: Technical Debt Level
criteria.description: Is technical debt minimal and tracked? (Note: 5=minimal debt, 1=massive unmanaged debt)

criteria.name: Security (Auth, Secrets, Vulns)
criteria.description: Are authentication, secrets management, and known vulnerabilities properly handled?

criteria.name: Performance & Scalability
criteria.description: Does the system meet performance targets and scale horizontally/vertically?

criteria.name: Observabilité (Logs, Metrics, Alerting)
criteria.description: Are logs, metrics, and alerting in place for monitoring system health?

criteria.name: CI/CD Pipeline Maturity
criteria.description: Is the deployment pipeline automated, traceable, and reversible?
